title: Audit constraint coverage before sign-off
description: Confirm every clock, I/O, and exception is intentional and complete using the tool's coverage reports.
body: Use when finalizing constraints ahead of a release build. Do not trust a passing STA alone, since a missing constraint can make timing look met while a path goes untimed. Actions: run the constraint coverage report, verify every clock and I/O is constrained, and review each exception for justification. Validation signals include a coverage report with no unconstrained objects and every exception traced to a documented reason. Risk boundary: an untimed path that passes by omission fails in the field, so deny sign-off until coverage is complete.
